title: 20 people observed countless shape-shifting UFOs in Ceilândia Norte-DF [1996]*
content:
Interrrelated with Case ARX.0.0.470

DEC 7th, 1996. Time: 8:20 pm. Duration: 20 minutes. In Ceilândia Norte, Distrito Federal, about 20 people observed “lights changing from diamond to circle” in the skies of their neighborhood. The sighting of the several UFOs was done with the naked eye and a sky with several clouds. The shape-shifting UFOs, according to the witnesses, were approximately 5 meters long. They were white and flew at a speed of approximately 180km/h. The witnesses further claimed that the unknown objects were at an altitude of approximately 10,000 meters and were in a northern direction in relation to the observers of the event.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.469. “Questionário sobre a ocorrência de objeto voador não identificado na área de Ceilândia Norte, Distrito Federal”. Brasília, DF. 1952 a 2015. Último acesso realizado em 27/05/2020.

The BRAZILIAN UFO ARCHIVES website is a private initiative and IS NOT endorsed or sponsored by the Arquivo Nacional do Brasil [see our ‘Info’ page]. *THE ORIGINAL FILE WITH THE CASE REFERRED TO IN THIS TEXT CAN BE FOUND IN THE DOCUMENTAL COLLECTION OF “ARQUIVO NACIONAL DO BRASIL, LOCATED IN THE “OBJETO VOADOR NÃO IDENTIFICADO (OVNI)” FUND, UNDER THE REFERENCE CODE [“Código de Referência”] MENTIONED ABOVE.
